summary.original: Deterministic prose linter for LLM text — flags AI slop, filler, buzzwords, hedges, clichés.
summary.zhCN: 用本地确定性规则标记填充表达、空泛限定、企业黑话与陈词滥调。

description.original: The deterministic slop check for AI-generated prose. Point it at a changelog, a doc, or an agent's own output and get back the filler phrases to cut — plus a CI exit code and a pinnable score, identical on every run. No model, no API key.
description.zhCN: defluff 是无需模型和 API 密钥的确定性文本检查器，返回可删短语、分类、权重、字符位置、去冗分数和可固定的词典版本。Agent-OPT 不把它包装成不可靠的‘AI 作者检测器’，而是用于检查草稿、文档和更新日志中的填充表达；自定义词条与忽略项只能写入项目沙箱。

evidence.note: The namespace-verified registry record identifies version 0.1.2, the GitHub repository, PyPI package, stdio transport, and defluff-mcp entry point.
PyPI supplies the exact release time, Python requirement, dependencies, repository URLs, and full MIT license text.
The pinned official README documents deterministic local detection, the three MCP tools, output fields, overlay behavior, and lack of API-key requirements.
The pinned repository LICENSE contains the MIT terms and Ahmed Karanath's copyright notice.

license.evidence: The official repository and PyPI release both provide the MIT license; Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package without copying its implementation.

description.original: Return a deterministic score and exact spans for clichés, hedges, filler transitions, AI vocabulary, and corporate buzzwords.
description.zhCN: 返回确定性分数，并给出陈词滥调、空泛限定、填充过渡、高频 AI 用语和企业黑话的准确位置。

description.original: Add a custom phrase to one of the five curated categories for future project-scoped checks.
description.zhCN: 把自定义短语加入五类词典之一，供当前项目沙箱后续检查使用。

description.original: Suppress a phrase that is legitimate domain terminology in this project.
description.zhCN: 把当前项目中的合法领域术语加入忽略列表，避免后续误报。

notes: The adapter launches the fixed defluff-mcp console entry point with no client-controlled command arguments.
HOME, USERPROFILE, and XDG_CONFIG_HOME are redirected to the project sandbox so host user overlays are neither read nor written.
slop_add and slop_ignore accept only scope=project and write under var/runtime/defluff/.defluff.

requirements: Project virtual environment installed from requirements-mcp.txt

description.original: Agent-OPT fixes the process working directory and user-home environment to its defluff runtime sandbox.
description.zhCN: Agent-OPT 将进程工作目录和用户主目录环境固定到 defluff 运行沙箱。

notes: Deterministic and local behavior makes results reproducible and inexpensive to verify.
Exact spans and category weights support a dedicated editing workflow rather than a generic chat box.
The rules encode editorial preferences and can produce false positives; the Web describes them as removable-filler signals, not proof of AI authorship.
Project-scoped add and ignore operations are useful, but require a strict filesystem boundary because upstream also supports machine-wide user overlays.
Translated slop as removable filler or text redundancy according to context, avoiding a claim that the tool can identify AI authorship.

features: project lexicon add and ignore controls

tests.evidence: Vitest launched defluff-mcp 0.1.2 over stdio, discovered slop_detect/slop_add/slop_ignore, and returned a live score with exact spans.
A temporary sandbox detected built-in filler, added quantum synergy to the project lexicon, detected it, ignored it, and confirmed the next detection no longer returned that span.
Empty detection text, unsupported categories, multiline phrases, and invalid scope values were rejected before upstream invocation.
scope=user was rejected; real overlay writes landed under the temporary project sandbox; HOME, USERPROFILE, XDG_CONFIG_HOME, and cwd were all adapter-fixed to that sandbox.
Playwright Chromium submitted a filler-heavy draft through DefluffWorkspace and observed the score dashboard, raw slop_score evidence, and an exact Furthermore span card.
